semantic.role: Prompt template factory for generating architecture diagram views. Consumed by the view derivation pipeline to produce structured LLM prompts.
responsibilities: Construct LLM prompts that request a JSON architecture diagram specification from project and folder summaries.
Render project context and folder summaries into formatted Markdown blocks using shared template helpers.
Inject strict output instructions (JSON only, allowed node types, edge validation, summary cards).
Embed a JSON schema of the expected architecture diagram structure to guide model output.
outOfScope: Parsing or validating the LLM response after generation.
Rendering SVG, Mermaid, or other diagram formats directly.
invariants: The prompt always includes the instruction 'Return STRICT JSON only' as a guard against markdown-wrapped output.
The prompt always produces exactly 3 summary cards with fixed headings.
The function relies exclusively on the provided project and folder summaries, never on external data.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable prompt factory for the architecture diagram view within the view derivation system, ensuring LLM-generated diagrams conform to a strict schema.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: New module introduced as part of v1.0.0 release establishing the architectural governance layer.

publicSurface.description: Builds a complete LLM prompt string for generating a JSON architecture diagram specification, given a project unit and an array of folder units. Called by the view derivation pipeline when producing architecture diagram views.
